name: Danske Invest Select Euro Investment Grade Corporate Bonds Restricted KL DKK d
summary: Danske Invest Select Euro Investment Grade Corporate Bonds Restricted KL DKK d is a Danish investment fund that invests in euro-denominated investment-grade corporate bonds. The fund aims to provide investors with a stable income stream and capital appreciation by selecting high-quality corporate bonds, denominated in DKK. The fund is managed by Danske Invest.
